steps.title: Identify the contrasting distances
steps.content: JWST is positioned nearly one million miles from Earth, while Hubble is only 340 miles above Earth. These vastly different distances create the key relationship to mark.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: 'By contrast' directly marks opposition. Therefore suggests consequence, Secondly indicates sequential addition, and Similarly misrepresents opposition as sameness. That matches choice A — A is correct.
